# Param circs test

还是更适合IBM一点。

```{python}
from qiskit_aer.primitives import SamplerV2
from qiskit.transpiler import generate_preset_pass_manager
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator

backend = AerSimulator(
    method="statevector",
    device="CPU",
)

pm = generate_preset_pass_manager(
    optimization_level=1,
    backend=backend,
)

isa_qc = pm.run(qc)

sampler = SamplerV2(
    default_shots=1024,
    options={
        "backend_options": {
            "method": "statevector",
            "device": "CPU",
        },
        "run_options": {}
    }
)

job = sampler.run([
    (isa_qc, param_sets, 1024)
])

pub_result = job.result()[0]

# 默认 measure_all 的 classical register 名字通常是 "meas"
counts = pub_result.data.meas.get_counts()
```
